creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Regression range: base r332632 (good) and base r332849 (bad). Same as bug 227686 and bug 227698 but assertion is different.

c++ -fno-PIE -c   -O2 -pipe -DCROSS_DIRECTORY_STRUCTURE -DLIBICONV_PLUG -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -DIN_GCC  -DCROSS_DIRECTORY_STRUCTURE  -fno-strict-aliasing -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fasynchronous-unwind-tables -W -Wall -Wno-narrowing -Wwrite-strings -Wcast-qual -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -pedantic -Wno-long-long -Wno-variadic-macros -Wno-overlength-strings   -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I. -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/powerpc64-gcc/work/gcc-6.3.0/gcc -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/powerpc64-gcc/work/gcc-6.3.0/gcc/. -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/powerpc64-gcc/work/gcc-6.3.0/gcc/../include -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/powerpc64-gcc/work/gcc-6.3.0/gcc/../libcpp/include -I/usr/local/include  -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/powerpc64-gcc/work/gcc-6.3.0/gcc/../libdecnumber -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/powerpc64-gcc/work/gcc-6.3.0/gcc/../libdecnumber/dpd -I../libdecnumber -I/wrkdirs/usr/ports/devel/powerpc64-gcc/work/gcc-6.3.0/gcc/../libbacktrace  -DLIBICONV_PLUG -o insn-opinit.o -MT insn-opinit.o -MMD -MP -MF ./.deps/insn-opinit.TPo insn-opinit.c
Assertion failed: (FromReg != ToReg && "Cannot replace a reg with itself"), function replaceRegWith, file /usr/local/poudriere/jails/head-i386/usr/src/contrib/llvm/lib/CodeGen/MachineRegisterInfo.cpp, line 343.
c++: error: unable to execute command: Abort trap (core dumped)
c++: error: clang frontend command failed due to signal (use -v to see invocation)
FreeBSD clang version 6.0.0 (tags/RELEASE_600/final 326565) (based on LLVM 6.0.0)
Target: i386-unknown-freebsd12.0
Thread model: posix
InstalledDir: /usr/bin
